message: I ordered a product online and it arrived damaged. I want a full refund immediately, or I’m taking my business elsewhere.
My order was never received. I’ve checked my email and tracking info—no updates. Please refund me right away.
The item I ordered is completely wrong. It’s not what was described, and I’m not happy. Refund me now.
I received a defective product. The description said it was new and working, but it’s broken. I want a refund or replacement.
